title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
